subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Him Who hath borne witness unto that which God Himself hath testified - that there is none other God but Him - that He might render the sweet fragrance of utterance steadfast in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری من شهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لیجعله عرف البیان مستقیما علی امر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
